code:
model = Sketchup.active_model
sel = model.selection.to_a
if sel.empty?
  { 'ok' => false, 'error' => 'no objects selected' }
else
  model.start_operation('AWARE scale selected', true)
  t = Geom::Transformation.scaling(Geom::Point3d.new(0, 0, 0), 2.0)
  model.entities.transform_entities(t, sel)
  model.commit_operation
  { 'ok' => true, 'scaled' => sel.length, 'factor' => 2.0 }
end
